title: orthopogon compositus
intro: Orthopogon compositus, also known as Java vetiver or Khas, is a type of tropical grass native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its thick, woody roots and fragrant leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Orthopogon compositus include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Orthopogon compositus include essential oils extracted from its roots, which can be used in aromatherapy, skincare products, or as a natural remedy for various health issues.
